Outcome_Taxonomy.primary_exit_trigger: Surgeon sign-off and identification of skilled need (RN/PT)
Outcome_Taxonomy.leading_indicator_of_failure: Patient stabilizes clinically but has no support system or reliable caregiver at home

Outcome_Taxonomy.primary_exit_trigger: Completion of home modification (e.g., wheelchair ramp or chair lift installation)
Outcome_Taxonomy.leading_indicator_of_failure: Waiver estimates are rejected, or the Medicaid approval process is delayed indefinitely

Outcome_Taxonomy.primary_exit_trigger: Day 101 Medicare benefit exhaustion or Social Worker safety pivot
Outcome_Taxonomy.leading_indicator_of_failure: Family verbalizes an 'inability to help at home' or demonstrates unwillingness to assist
Outcome_Taxonomy.v5_outcome_mapping: Neutral_LTC_Closure — LTC pivot is a job requirement, NOT a failure. PN logs neutral closure in Atlantis.

Outcome_Taxonomy.primary_exit_trigger: Acute medical emergency (e.g., acute CHF or respiratory failure)
Outcome_Taxonomy.leading_indicator_of_failure: Evidence of O2 tank mismanagement, cellulitis flare-up, or missed HHA monitoring visits
Outcome_Taxonomy.v5_outcome_mapping: Failure_Transition_Breakdown — The home transition failed; patient returned to acute care.

Outcome_Taxonomy.primary_exit_trigger: First home visit completed within 24–48 hours of discharge with our services
Outcome_Taxonomy.leading_indicator_of_failure: Competitive steering by Social Worker or failure to establish trust during the intake phase
Outcome_Taxonomy.v5_outcome_mapping: Success_Home_with_First_Visit — Patient discharges home with our services AND the first post-discharge home visit is completed.

Outcome_Taxonomy.primary_exit_trigger: Patient or SW selects a different home health agency
Outcome_Taxonomy.leading_indicator_of_failure: PN failed to build rapport or HHA could not staff the case in the patient's area
Outcome_Taxonomy.v5_outcome_mapping: Neutral_Alternative_Agency — Patient chose a different agency. This is a job requirement, NOT a failure.
